attribute_description: Overall energy conversion efficiency: main output energy / main input energy.
note: Based on kW output capacity / LHV (chemical) energy.

attribute_description: Technology Readiness Level on the standard 1–9 scale. For non-mature technologies; TRL values progress across tech_year.
Aggregated maturity classification derived from TRL. Updated per tech_year.
Nameplate capacity on which all specific cost and performance data are based.
Ratio of the main output's energy content (LHV) to the main input's energy content (LHV) at theoretical maximum.
note: May be blank if not applicable.

attribute_description: Typical operating temperature of the process.
Smallest assumed unit capacity for the technology.
Economic lifetime of the asset.
Fixed capital expenditure (independent of size).
Fixed annual operational expenditure expressed as a percentage of total CAPEX.
Fixed annual operational expenditure per unit of installed capacity; excluding fuel costs.
Variable operational expenditure per unit of energy or mass output; excluding fuel costs.
Technology-specific weighted average cost of capital for annualising capital expenditure.
Flag indicating whether parameter values have been cross-checked against literature ranges.
The physical medium of storage (e.g.; 'Li-Ion'; 'Water').
Smallest assumed storage capacity.
Maximum charging power as fraction of rated storage capacity (C-rate equivalent).
Maximum discharging power as fraction of rated storage capacity.
Energy efficiency during charging.
Energy efficiency during discharging.
Minimum state of charge as fraction of total capacity.
Maximum state of charge as fraction of total capacity.
Fractional energy loss per hour during standby (self-discharge rate).
Specific capital expenditure per unit of installed storage capacity.
Fixed one-time operational expenditure independent of capacity.
